title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is a framework that integrates AI-driven code generation workflows across GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and now Jira. Cole Medin demonstrated building a live Jira adapter where tickets trigger automated bug fixes and pull requests. Each Jira ticket gets a dedicated conversation context with Archon to run custom workflows.
